rulings.Case Title: PENINSULA CORRIDOR JOINT POWERS BOARD A JOINT VS. GOLDEN BAY FENCE PLUS IRON WORKS INC. A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to November 12, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SLFR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the late-filed rely no later than October 18, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court notes that Defendant has been previously advised that courtesy copies have to be delivered. While in accordance with October 7, 2019 minute order courtesy copies of the moving papers have been delivered, no courtesy copies of the reply have been received. Failure to comply with procedural requirements in the future will result in papers not being considered. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: APIC HOTEL METROPOLIS LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BLACK RABBIT HOSPITAL INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT DEANNA SISON Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Hearing Required to address service. Compare paragraph 3(b)(1) of Mandatory Judicial Council Form Declaration ("served the client by mail") and Amended POS for e-mail service only. Also, address why e-mail service is proper. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Of September 3, 2019 Denying Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Ccp 1008
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Of September 3, 2019 Denying Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Ccp 1008 is continued to October 29, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of opposition papers to department 501 by 9:00 a.m. on October 15, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AGUSTIN MACEDO VS. LESLIE CORDERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Continue Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT LESLIE CORDERO, ALYSSA VELASQUEZ MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Continue Trial Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SONG HEE CHU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Defendant to allege facts in support of each of the three affirmative defenses. Amended Answer shall be filed and served by 2:00 p.m. on October 21, 2019. Parties and their counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in the future. Failure to do so will result in papers not being considered. No courtesy copy of the Answer provided by Plaintiff and no courtesy copy of the opposition provided by defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON DRUMMOND VS. ROBERT L. STEVENSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ROBERT STEVENSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges compliance. Whether this allegation is true cannot be addressed at this stage of the litigation. Defendant's introduction of authority (some of which is not citable) and RJN with reply is not going to be considered.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: K. MIRANDA VS. MATTHEW BANCROFT MOORE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT MATTHEW MOORE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT DON CAREY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Don Carey, Emily Petit and Eric Montoya to be present. Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)
